prf_comm: RA, Noluthando Sithole informed the mother today (12-05-2025) of the positive IGRA result and the meaning thereof. A referral letter was delivered to the mother. The mother understood and agreed to attend to the health care facility. The team will follow up to confirm whether she attended the health care facility for further management.   19 May 2025.: Mother could not be reached via phone, a home visits was done to follow up if she attended the clinic. Mother informed the RA that she will be attending to the clinic this week and mentioned that the child has started coughing. Will follow up again with her to confirm if she attended.     02 Jun 2025 Nolu got hold of mommy , she was unable to go to clinic yet due to working conditions.  Will go 03 Jun 2025    09 Jun 2025 Phone the mother - according to her she was working most of the time and had not the time to attend the clinic. Will sent N Sithole a message once visited the clinic.    13 Jun 2025: N. Sithole phoned the mother to confirm whether she had attended to the clinic with the referral letter. Mother did not answer ? at work. 12h00- phoned again, ?lunch time at work, still no answer. Will perform a home visit again.    20 Jun 2025  Phoned mom - phone on voice mail, will preform a home visit next week    06 Aug 2025  Mom did not yet go to clinic .    A copy will be given to her tomorrow for further investigations
